title: lasthenia ornduffii
intro: Lasthenia ornduffii, also known as Ornduff's goldfields or Ornduff's dune-tops goldfields, is a rare, annual plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lasthenia ornduffii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as bronchitis and asthma.
